mapper.select: SELECT mpc.failed_login_count FROM member_password_credentials mpc JOIN member m ON m.member_id = mpc.member_id WHERE m.email = #{email}
SELECT mpc.locked_until FROM member_password_credentials mpc JOIN member m ON m.member_id = mpc.member_id WHERE m.email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE member_password_credentials mpc JOIN member m ON m.member_id = mpc.member_id SET mpc.locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, mpc.failed_login_count = 0 WHERE m.email = #{email}
UPDATE member_password_credentials mpc JOIN member m ON m.member_id = mpc.member_id SET mpc.locked_until = NULL, mpc.failed_login_count = 0 WHERE m.email = #{email}
UPDATE member_password_credentials mpc JOIN member m ON m.member_id = mpc.member_id SET mpc.failed_login_count = 0 WHERE m.email = #{email}
